title: T3 Ingestion: Distill: system-comprehension (180) — refresh + overlap map
prompt: The system-comprehension cluster (180 artifacts) was ALREADY distilled 2026-05-17 into 5 draft files in research/distillations/ — do not redistill. Your mission is the missing half of the candidate brief: a distill-phase OVERLAP MAP re-verifying each of the 5 sub-clusters' winner/gap claims against David's CURRENT comprehension tooling (appydave system-context/craft-readme/brain-query chain, the installed understand-anything plugin whose upstream repo was never reconned into the corpus, comprehend-visualise, session-archaeology, kdd-viewer/project-digest CLIs). Produce research/distillations/system-comprehension-overlap-map.md with one fixed-vocabulary verdict per sub-cluster (STILL-A-GAP / NOW-COVERED / PARTIALLY-COVERED / WINNER-STALE / PENDING-T3-05) plus evidence paths, an append-only section at the end of research/distillations/INDEX.md, a proof report at backlog/wargames/proof/T3-07/REPORT.md, and a commit. ANALYSIS ONLY: nothing enters canonical/ (the living-system spec marks all 76 distillations provisional — no ingestion until L2 completes), and the 5 existing distillation files stay byte-identical (research/ is append-only). Read and execute the war game at backlog/wargames/T3-07-distill-system-comprehension.md. Follow its moves in order; on any failure signal apply the counter-move; on any abort condition stop and write needs-decision/.
verify: research/distillations/system-comprehension-overlap-map.md exists, <=300 lines, frontmatter has distillation_id system-comprehension-overlap-map + inventory_date, names all 5 sub-clusters (repo-onboarding, pre-action-scan, brownfield-forensics, intent-routing, domain-research) each with a verdict from the fixed vocabulary (grep -E 'STILL-A-GAP|NOW-COVERED|PARTIALLY-COVERED|WINNER-STALE|PENDING-T3-05' hits), and covers the understand-anything out-of-corpus adoption finding. tail -40 research/distillations/INDEX.md shows a 'System-Comprehension Overlap Map' section and git diff HEAD~1 --numstat on INDEX.md shows 0 deleted lines (pure append). backlog/wargames/proof/T3-07/REPORT.md exists with the 5-verdict table and mandatory findings. A commit mentioning the overlap map exists. Negative: the commit touches none of the 5 original system-comprehension-*.md files, git status --short canonical/ is empty (nothing ingested), git -C ~/dev/ad/appydave-plugins diff --quiet passes, and the map contains no 'ingest now' language (provisional gate respected).
